comments: Old Acc. No. 56-76-24: 1 female-plumaged on December 20, 1975.  3 female-plumaged from 11 Dec 1976 to 7 March 1977, included three immature females collected for specimens DMNH 37694-37696: Andrews and Righter, Colorado Birds, pg 407, 1992.
citations: Andrews, R.  1976-1977 Report of the CBRC. Western Birds, 10, 57-70.
